## Summary: Proper Skill Package Structure

```
P:/.claude/skills/llm-models/
├── SKILL.md          ← Skill definition with frontmatter
└── README.md         ← Full documentation

P:/__csf/src/commands/
└── llm_models.py     ← Implementation script (445 lines)

P:/__csf/
└── llm-models        ← Executable alias
```

**Usage:**

```bash
# Via skill invocation (recommended)
/llm-models discover --free-only
/llm-models research "best coding models"
/llm-models compare --focus coding

# Via alias
llm-models leaderboard --task reasoning
```

**Skill is now properly registered** and appears in the available skills list as:
- `llm-models: Unified LLM model discovery, research, and performance ana...`
